# Before-after workflow drama

## When to use

Use for products that compress steps.

## Why it works

Shows transformation.

## Mechanism

Specific workflow contrast is easy to understand.

## Required inputs

Before steps, after steps, proof clip.

## When not to use

If outcome is not visually obvious.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

Video retention, click-through, demo usage.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
